_readme: Copy this file to data/config.json and fill in your values. Every key is optional — an absent or empty value leaves its feature dormant. data/ is git-ignored, so nothing here ever reaches the repo.
_owner_name: Your first name — used in the cockpit greeting and the daily-brief narrative.
_crm_root: Directory holding people.json, master.json, profiles/. You normally never touch this: the Setup window's contact importers create and fill it. Point it elsewhere only if you already keep CRM data in this shape. Until people.json exists there, Vira boots in fixture mode with one demo contact (Vira themself).
_graph_email: Default account for the Connect M365 button and the cockpit banner.
_msgraph: Your own tenant's app registration for Microsoft Graph mail/calendar (public client flows enabled, device-code login). See README > Mail.
_notify_handle: iMessage handle Vira pings for high-value inbound email (your own self-thread number, e.g. +12125551234). Empty = notifications off.
_family_calendars: Calendar names (as they appear in Calendar.app) tagged as family in the daily brief, e.g. ["Family", "Kids"].
_brief_remote_events: Event-title substrings (case-insensitive) treated as remote/virtual in the daily brief, e.g. ["Weekly Standup"]. A remote event is never flagged as an overlap against a same-time in-person event (two remote events still conflict). M365 events also auto-detect via the Graph isOnlineMeeting flag.
_ai_backend: "cli" uses the local claude CLI (Max plan); "api" uses the Anthropic API via the VIRA_ANTHROPIC_KEY env var.
_ai_health_enabled: Deterministic AI-backend health watcher: probes `claude auth status` (or the API key) on a cadence and texts you the moment the model login goes down, so an expired Claude session surfaces out-of-band instead of as a silently dead cockpit job. Uses none of the model itself. false = disable the watcher (the /api/health/ai probe still works on demand).
_ai_health_interval_min: Minutes between health probes (clamped to a 60s floor). The probe is cheap and spends no tokens.
_ai_health_notify: Text the owner (via notify_handle) on a green->red edge and on recovery. Dormant unless notify_handle is set, like every other Vira notification.
_session_default_mode: Live coding sessions: "interactive" pauses risky tool calls for your Approve/Deny in the job panel; "autopilot" bypasses all permission checks (the old behavior). Per-run override in the UI.
_session_auto_allow: Read-only tools the permission gate approves without asking. Anything else that reaches the gate raises an Approve/Deny card in the session panel.
_session_permission_timeout: Seconds an unanswered permission card waits before the gate DENIES it by default (the session then continues rather than hanging forever).
_session_max_live: Cap on concurrent live agent sessions (each holds a claude CLI subprocess against the Max plan). Launches past the cap are rejected with a clear error.
_mercury_poll_hours: How often the subscriptions module polls Mercury for new charges. Dormant until a READ ONLY Mercury API token is in the Keychain: security add-generic-password -U -a mercury -s vira-mercury -w
_receipts_sweep_days: How often the receipts pass sweeps mailboxes + indexed attachments for invoice/receipt evidence (targeted-first: flagged merchants sweep before the rest). Dormant until a mail account is configured. On-demand per merchant via the card's Find receipts button.
_subs_notify_threshold_usd: Renewal-ping floor: iMessage when a renewal is within 7 days and the per-cycle amount clears this (annual renewals always ping). Uses notify_handle; deduped per merchant + renewal date.
_vault_root: Notes vault the Brain window indexes (Obsidian or any folder of markdown; FTS + local nomic embeddings via Ollama; nothing leaves the machine at index time). Set it from Setup > Brain — point at an existing vault or start a fresh one there. Empty = the Brain stays dormant.
_vault_dirs: Vault subdirectories to index (recursive), plus root-level .md files always. Empty = the default set (wiki, Briefs, Sessions, retros, brain-retros).
_judge_model: Model for fresh-eyes judge sessions (circuit judge stages and the Judge button on job history). Accepts sonnet | opus | haiku | fable.
_atlas_anchor_org: Company name pinned as the Contact Atlas anchor cluster (substring-matched against CRM company fields), e.g. "Taurid Capital". Empty = no pinned cluster; communities still form by label propagation.
_atlas_max_nodes: Contact Atlas node cap - the N most-active tiered contacts rendered in the graph. Keeps the mesh legible and the O(n^2) edge passes cheap.
_atlas_min_edge_weight: Edges whose fused multi-signal weight falls below this are dropped from the atlas.
_companion_hub_url: URL the Android companion pairing QR points the phone at, e.g. http://your-machine.your-tailnet.ts.net:8377. Empty = auto-detect: the Tailscale MagicDNS name, then the tailnet IP, then the LAN IP.
_launchd_label: macOS: if Vira runs as a launchd service, its label (e.g. com.example.vira). The in-app updater then restarts via launchctl kickstart; empty = the updater refuses web-triggered restarts (nothing would relaunch the server).
_windows_task_name: Windows analog of launchd_label: the Task Scheduler task that keeps Vira running (scripts\run.ps1 -Register creates it, default name "Vira", and records it here). The updater restarts by exiting and letting the task's relaunch loop bring the new code up; empty = the updater refuses web-triggered restarts on Windows.
_fixture_mode: true/false forces demo/real mode; null (default) auto-detects: fixture when crm_root is missing.
_lab_root: Local checkout dir holding careers-teardown explorer directories (each with a data.js) to ingest as STATIC role corpora. Optional: the Applications module's normal source is the live board poller, which its front door sets up for you. applications_sources (list of {slug, company, path}) overrides it.
_self_record: The folder holding FACTS.md (the claim gate every application is checked against), your resume, and every generated package. Written by the Applications front door; set it by hand only if you already keep a record somewhere. Empty = <crm_root>/self.
_applications_universe: Where the scored candidate universe lives (candidate-universe/role/*.json plus *-raw-scores.json). Written by the front door. Empty = <self_record>/analysis.
_applications_locations: Place names you will work in, e.g. ["New York", "NYC"]. EMPTY MEANS UNFILTERED - every role stays eligible. Eligibility gates the phone ping and the default view, never what gets fetched.
_applications_remote_ok: Count remote postings as eligible. applications_remote_exclude / applications_region_hints (regex or list of substrings) tune which remote postings are actually reachable from where you are; both ship with US-centric defaults, and setting either to [] disables that test.
_whatsapp_bridge_port: Linked-device WhatsApp sidecar port (127.0.0.1 only). Dormant until paired via settings > WhatsApp. whatsapp_poll_seconds (default 5) and whatsapp_node_bin (default "node") tune the watcher and node binary.
